headline: The Atlantic created a searchable database of the music used to train AI
summary: The Atlantic built a public database of music used to train AI models. Four datasets were uncovered, two containing 12 million and 9 million tracks. The tool allows public searching of these vast AI training music collections.

headline: Musician and YouTuber Hainbach on ‘Breath of the Wild’ and Swiss Army Knives
summary: Hainbach is an experimental German composer known for making music with lab equipment. He describes his unique production style as the 'Dark Souls of synthesis'. The article features an interview with the artist about his creative process.

headline: Moves of the Diamond Hand is an unfinished, irresistibly weird dice-based RPG
summary: "Moves of the Diamond Hand" is a unique, dice-based RPG. The game features strange conversations and heavy dice rolling. Despite being unfinished, it offers a highly creative roleplaying experience.

headline: Toy Story has the right take on tech
summary: This article discusses "Toy Story's" perspective on technology. It's part of the "Installer" newsletter, focusing on tech topics. The piece connects the film's themes to current tech trends.

headline: Halo: Campaign Evolved Split-Screen Co-Op on PS5 Requires PlayStation Plus for Both Players
summary: Halo: Campaign Evolved split-screen co-op launches on PS5 next month. Both players will need PlayStation Plus subscriptions to play. This requirement applies to local split-screen cooperative gameplay.

headline: Ubisoft Co-Founder Claude Guillemot Dead at 69 After Plane Crash in France
summary: Claude Guillemot, a co-founder of Ubisoft, has died. He was 69 years old at the time of his passing. The death occurred due to a plane crash in France.

headline: Out of Words Is an Artistic, Handmade Breath of Fresh Air | IGN Preview
summary: "Out of Words" is a stop-motion co-op 2D platformer. Every element, from grass to moss, is meticulously handmade. The game's story draws inspiration from a poem, offering a unique artistic approach.

headline: Sea of Remnants Is Like a Puppet-Punk Persona at Sea | IGN Preview
summary: "Sea of Remnants" is a gorgeous, open-world fantasy RPG. It features ocean exploration, piracy, and a puppet-punk aesthetic. The charming, handcrafted look evokes studios like Laika.

headline: Nine people in critical condition among 100 injured in fatal Bedford train crash
summary: A train crash in Bedford resulted in one fatality, the train driver. Over 100 people were injured, with nine in critical condition. British Transport Police are investigating the cause of the collision.

headline: Talk of Starmer staying on to fight is fading - fast
summary: Support for the prime minister is rapidly declining. This follows Andy Burnham's recent by-election victory. Laura Kuenssberg notes the fading likelihood of Starmer staying to fight.

headline: Extreme heat warning expanded as 36C heatwave approaches UK
summary: An amber extreme heat warning has been expanded across the UK. Temperatures are expected to reach up to 36C by Tuesday. A heatwave is approaching after a slightly cooler Saturday.

headline: Five injured in suspected anti-Muslim attacks after armed man roamed Edinburgh streets
summary: Five people were injured in suspected anti-Muslim attacks in Edinburgh. An armed man was seen roaming streets, attacking individuals and property. Incidents occurred near a mosque and a pizzeria, causing public alarm.
